Global Variable# kIMKLocateCandidatesLeftHint

macOS 10.5+

```
var kIMKLocateCandidatesLeftHint: Int { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/inputmethodkit/kimklocatecandidateslefthint#Discussion)

Place the candidates window to the left of the current text selection.
